author: lOrm
content: Status check at HEAD 80439851: defect still present. src/permissions.rs:393-416 (glob_to_regex_cached) still splits the lookup-then-insert across two lock acquisitions with drop(cache) in between. Not closing — entry/or_insert_with refactor still needed; the issue is a permissions-manager change which the policy here explicitly forbids touching from this dispatch. Leaving open for a dedicated permissions-scoped fix.
